content:
Hello!
Would it be possible to have an explanation of how the scaling of this card works exactly? It seems the numbers displayed on the card can vary quite a bit. Is it linked to Vortice's Attack attribute? Keeper level? Something else? If it can be displayed in-game it would be ideal, but any answer would be much appreciated in order to avoid potentially wasting precious resources 🙏
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780/1483066969501597859

it's ATK, you can look in here for now https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/database/awk/vortice/cards.
They need to add it in the ability description\level up screen.
Plus there may be some problems on the damage shown in exploration that they are investigating
Wow, thanks friend! Do you know how this website is able to pull this info even if it's not visible in-game? Definitely what I was looking for, appreciate your help!
Mostly collaboration with cn wiki and testing
